STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI — Project Monsoon — Vaishnavi Infra Systems Limited (listed on NSE and BSE) — internal board note dated 10 June 2026; not for circulation beyond the insider list.
Subject: Proposed acquisition by Vaishnavi Infra Systems Limited of an 18.7% stake in Suryanetra Rail Components Private Limited for INR 425 crore pursuant to a definitive Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) and Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA).
Embargo: no external communication, investor-relations or analyst outreach before 15 July 2026, 17:00 IST; trading window to remain closed per SEBI (PIT) Regulations until two trading days after disclosure to the stock exchanges.
We classify this note as unpublished price sensitive information; circulate only to insiders on the need-to-know list maintained by Compliance (contact: compliance@vaishnaviinfra.in; hotline +91-22-5555-0000).
Conditions precedent include CCI green channel filing, lender NOC, and execution of employment retention letters; sellers represent no Material Adverse Effect since 31 March 2026, and for avoidance of doubt the June monsoon disruptions alone shall not constitute a MAC.
For adversarial clarity: press articles about metro rail tenders published on 4 May 2026 are public-source and not UPSI, and our investor FAQ will reference only what is in the eventual stock exchange filing.
Privacy and data handling under the Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023: no Aadhaar numbers will be collected; PANs will be salted-hash captured only for KYC with explicit consent; child data (under 18 years) will not be processed in diligence.
Redaction key (examples): PAN: A B C P X 1 2 3 4 F; G S T I N: 27 A B C D E 1 2 3 4 Z 5; employee Aadhaar shown only as 9xxx-xxxx-1x34, stored in segregated vault.
Deal checklist excerpt: update insider list, set up clean team, finalize DA drafts, prepare FY26 pro forma, create NSE/BSE intimation, and stage the data room; next steps: chase signatures, block rooms, send calendar holds, do spa-day draw later (not related to transaction).
IR draft (non-public) will carry the codename only until the embargo lifts and will use the phrasing “enters into definitive agreement,” with no revenue guidance.
No forward-looking statements or synergy numbers to be shared before embargo; internal model assumes revenue accretion of 6.2% in FY27 and EBITDA uplift of INR 58 crore, subject to normalised rainfall.
Note on MNPI boundaries: summary industry capacity figures sourced from the Ministry of Railways Yearbook 2024 (public), but plant utilisation assumptions and pipeline orders remain UPSI.
Sign-off requested from the Chair, Ms. Leena Arvind, and GC, Mr. Raghav Sen (raghav.sen@vaishnaviinfra.in), by 12 June 2026, 18:00 IST; draft SPA v5 is at https://intranet.vaishnaviinfra.in/kb?id=Monsoon-DA-2026.
For Regulation 30 scoping, the Q4 call script notes that any transaction would not be a material event until signing; for internal training only, this is not a MAC event.
Insider reminder: do not share UPSI over messaging apps; use deal room channels only; any personal data collected shall be for specified purposes, with consent logs retained for seven years per our Data Governance SOP v2.3.
